# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

Resources:
  MyS3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: my-application-bucket
      AccessControl: Private
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Suspended

  ApplicationIAMRolePolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: S3ReadWriteAccess
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Join ["", ["arn:aws:s3:::", !Ref MyS3Bucket, "/*"]]
      Roles:
        - !Ref ApplicationIAMRole

  ApplicationIAMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: BasicS3Access
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !Sub arn:aws:s3:::${MyS3Bucket}
